title: Claude Design Tutorial: Build a Website in Minutes with AI
summary: Claude Design is a feature by Anthropic that generates UI prototypes, presentations, and landing pages from text prompts. The tool enables users to create functional designs and downloadable code without manual design work, supporting templates and custom design systems.
